text.title: Business Storytelling (Pyramid / SCQA / Pixar) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Case study spends 300 words on context before stating the outcome.
antipattern.fix: Move outcome to sentence 1; chronology goes into body.

antipattern.symptom: SCQA Complication reads 'and then they wanted to improve' — no tension.
antipattern.fix: Make Complication concrete and surprising: 'the report missed the board meeting; revenue questions went unanswered'.

antipattern.symptom: Pixar arc skips from 'one day' directly to 'until finally' without 'because of that' links.
antipattern.fix: Insert ≥2 because-of-that links; each one earns the resolution.

antipattern.symptom: Body opens Pyramid, transitions to Pixar mid-paragraph.
antipattern.fix: Choose one framework; refactor or rewrite if mixed.
